creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
fcsk.aim, thanks for your request. This particular request has been rejected because there is no valid patch available.

If I may ask why do you need this particular software? If LZO is what you want, we have archivers/lzo2 in ports already from apparently the same author:

http://www.freshports.org/archivers/lzo2

minilzo appears to be code that you need to #include in your program, as Dmitry already explained, and as its README.LZO states. So it's not a standalone program, I don't think it even builds as a shared library, and therefore there's nothing to port.
